commands.cmd: node -e "const p=require('./packages/protocol/package.json'); console.log(JSON.stringify({name:p.name, private:p.private, files:p.files, bin:p.bin, publishConfig:p.publishConfig}, null, 2));"
commands.notes: Confirmed @workpack/protocol manifest is publishable with private:false, files/bin map, and public publishConfig.
Dry-run tarball includes schemas, templates, agent-docs, bin/init.js, and tools assets.

verification.regression_notes: No runtime behavior changes; packaging metadata and documentation only.

handoff.summary: Hardened @workpack/protocol npm publish readiness by setting explicit publish metadata and adding publish verification guidance.
next_steps: Proceed to A3_ci_release_pipeline to wire tag-based npm publish and VSIX release workflows.
known_issues: Unrelated workspace changes exist in package.json, package-lock.json, .vscodeignore, and resources/icon.png and were intentionally excluded from this commit.

notes: A2 implementation limited to protocol npm publish readiness and output artifact generation.
